form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] name[名称] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] priority[优先级] isActive[是否启用] =========>scope[作用范围]====== productId[产品] productCategory[产品类别] customerId[客户] customerCategory[客户类别] =========>range[数量区间]====== minQuantity[最小数量] maxQuantity[最大数量] =========>price[价格]====== priceOverride[价格覆盖] discountPercent[折扣比例] discountAmount[折扣金额] currencyId[币种] =========>validity[有效期]====== effectiveFrom[生效日期] effectiveTo[失效日期] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] name[名称] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] priority[优先级] isActive[是否启用] =========>scope[作用范围]====== productId[产品] productCategory[产品类别] customerId[客户] customerCategory[客户类别] =========>range[数量区间]====== minQuantity[最小数量] maxQuantity[最大数量] =========>price[价格]====== priceOverride[价格覆盖] discountPercent[折扣比例] discountAmount[折扣金额] currencyId[币种] =========>validity[有效期]====== effectiveFrom[生效日期] effectiveTo[失效日期] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[编码] name[名称] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] productId[产品] customerId[客户] effectiveFrom[生效日期]
